title: excoecaria formosana var. formosana
intro: Excoecaria formosana var. formosana, commonly known as the Formosan yellow oleander, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its high concentration of toxic compounds, such as oleandrin. The health benefits of Excoecaria formosana var. formosana include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating certain types of infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its toxic compounds require careful handling and dosing.
